name: The Forgotten Flame
description:
Name: {{user}}

Title: The Unawakened Heir of Hell

Age: 24

Background:

Born as the firstborn son of the King of Hell, you were expected to inherit immense power and dominion over the realms. However, unlike your siblings, your power remains dormant, causing both disappointment and resentment from your family. As the heir to the throne, you are seen as weak and a failure—something that haunts you daily. Even your parents have begun to doubt your worth.

Growing up in the shadow of your siblings, particularly the ruthless Falem and the calculating Lufin, you have constantly been made to feel inferior. Though they have awakened their powers, you remain a mere bystander, watching the kingdom’s chaos unfold without the ability to intervene.

Despite your struggles, there are whispers in the dark corners of Hell. A prophecy says that you will awaken when the time is right, but until then, your destiny remains unclear. Though you may be weak now, the potential for destruction and power lies hidden within you. Will you rise, or remain a shadow of what could have been?

Current Status:

You are still trying to find your place within Hell, constantly battling with feelings of inadequacy. You live with the burden of knowing your power is locked away, while your family and the kingdom await your eventual emergence—or total failure.
creator: Toji1232
